reviews.review_title: Greatest game I've played in a while
reviews.review_description: This game is one of the most lore accurate, best quality, and most immersive VR backrooms games out there. There's also 43 different unique levels and many different puzzles/objectives. This game is definitely worth the $4 dollars. There's so much in this game.

Call me old, but the reason I’m giving this game 3 stars is because the controls (using your arms) have my arms dropping thru the floor half the time. Also I do not like that 99% of the co-op players are children. That can’t be helped by the devs, I understand, but if the controls were fixed, I would bump up the rating.

developer_response.body: Could u specifiy what you mean by "have my arms dropping thru the floor half the time"?? And about the audience stuff we cant really change that.

reviews.review_description: Man what a journey, over 40 levels of great quality, good sounds,  and unique monsters. I only ask one thing and one thing only for this game. There are some things that are placeholder or look bad, and if you join or create a code sometimes, it will make it so you have to restart. Other than that it has pretty much new monsters and tasks almost every level, with friends it was just great.

This game was amazing walking through over 30 or something levels. I found friends, researched how to beat levels. Me and my friend spent a week doing this, getting carried by guys I didn’t even know the username of. $3.99 isn’t enough to hold the fun and adventure of this game. The credits were amazing seeing how the game developed. If any backrooms game or game in general had a name. This one would be “Best Game Ever.”

I just bought the game for me, my cousin, and brother and we hopped in and were blown away by how good this game is! The monsters are scary and the levels are really nice and I like how you have a health bar instead of insta dying when you get hit by a monster like in some fan games. Im excited to play through the other levels this game is a 5 star, definitely recommend for people who love chaos and backrooms. 👌

Me and my friend bought this game yesterday not knowing what to expect. Let me just say it’s worth the money! There is over 30 different backrooms levels and all of them take long to complete, the game has challenge and I like that. And the best part is you can save your progress and come back whenever! This game is super fun and scary, so if your a backrooms fans I most definitely recommend this game! (ITS SO HIGH QUALITY AND WELL MADE)

This game blew me away!! When I got this game I thought it would be like all the others, but it’s the most fun and realistic Backrooms game I’ve ever played! The really puts noclip to shame. And for the price, this game is a must buy!! If you are looking for a good Backrooms game with fresh content all the time ABSOLUTELY GET THIS GAME!!

36 levels, good mechanics, I bought this game and so did my friend to try it out in vr, undebatably THE BEST backrooms VR game. Very heavily inspired by Escape The Backrooms and I love that! PEAK GAME BROO THE CONTENT IS SO LONG AND SOO FUN ESPECIALLY WITH FRIENDS LIKE I WANNA FREAKING LIKE JUST GIVE THE DEVELOPER OF THIS GAME LIKE $20 WHY IS THIS GAME SOO CHEAP AND GOOD AGHHHH

developer_response.body:
HII!! We’re SO thankful that you enjoy our game this much! :D

If you really want to help support us, you could always gift the game to other people XD

Thank you so much for this review it genuinely made our day!

reviews.review_description: It has lots of levels and lots of things to do but there is a lot of glitches and I am so grateful that my friend gifted this game to me and the game is actually scary there is no modders no brainrot stuff it’s just pure scary stuff and I like that

The quality of this game is just amazing it looks so realistic ￼and gameplay is fun tons of levels will have you hooked for hours however there are a few bugs and glitches here and there but they have a amazing dev team working hard on the game so props to them %100 worth your money

reviews.review_title: This is the best backroom game EVER
reviews.review_description: This game was hard and challenging but also very fun it made you have to strategize and it was just so fun he will never forget when you beat it I loved it when you beat a hard level after a long time this is the best game ever you need to buy it and it's even funner if you have your friends with you too also is very accurate to the actual backrooms so buy the game Now!!!!🫪

reviews.review_title: One of the best backrooms games
reviews.review_description:
This game is really good. It has multiple levels so you never get bored. And the entities are scary. A problem with this game is that when you are on the elevator on level 52.1 if you don’t put your hands up you fall straight through the elevator. I suggest that you should add a report button on the menu to where you can see all the players in your room. So if someone is being really rude you can report them for toxicity. Or if someone is hacking you can report them for exploiting.
But other than that, THIS IS ONE OF THE BEST BACKROOMS GAMES I HAVE EVER PLAYED

Let me just say, this is the best quality, realistic backrooms game out there! Me and my friends got this game and it is so fun, and there are a lot of levels.. BUT one thing they can fix is the selection lag, what I mean by this is whenever you try to join or create a server for people to join you usually have to restart your game. But other than that it's awesome!

reviews.review_title: Best backrooms vr game out there
reviews.review_description: This game has the most levels you’ll find on any backrooms vr game. Not just that but the graphics, gameplays, and overall experience you get from playing this game for ONLY $4. BIGGEST steal you could ever have. This is the most lore accurate and immersive backtooms vr game ever. For only $4 btw👀

reviews.review_title: Best Backrooms Game in a While
reviews.review_description: I was bored on my phone until my friend called me and asked me to buy this four dollar game. He was praising it like crazy saying it was the best, and worth my money. I was originally skeptical, as when people usually purchase games, they get bored immediately, and never play it again. However, my expectations were passed completely, and unlike certain Backrooms games, they didn’t focus on just the quantity of levels, but focused heavily on quality. There are many levels, but I like the simple details. I’ve played it much since purchasing it, and would highly recommend it to anyone who enjoys fun, enticing Backrooms games.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games oat
reviews.review_description: This game is lore accurate, photorealistic, scary, and best of all, time consuming. some of the levels can take hours to complete which makes it even better so you dont complete everything in 1 hour and make it feel like a waste of money, no. i think it can still be improved on some things ofc but as of now it is pretty much a perfect game. i honestly suggest adding gamemodes for more content but overall W game.

This is one of the best games I've ever played. There are 40+ levels, and every single one of them is fun, scary, and exciting. There are tons of monsters that make the game like no other. There are a ton of known levels, like level 0, level !!!, and level 94, along with unknown levels like level 0.1, level 52.1, and level Fun+. This game deserves to be more than $4, so get it while it is. You can have up to 6 players in 1 game. After you beat a level, you unlock it permanently for you to play at any time. I highly recommend playing the story first. It should take you 1 to 3 days to finish. I beat it in 2. Consider getting this amazing game. Thanks for reading my review.

Facility apes 3 is a great game and i think you should buy it firstly because it has so much lore accurate levels secondly it has great graphics third the gane has a friendly community and make sure to join the discord to be let know whenever new levels come out *I AM NOT A DEVELOPER OR BETA TESTER OR ANYTHING LIKE THAT THIS IS MY HONEST REVIEW ON THE GAME

The game is awesome. I was walking around with my friends, we turn left and then BOOM. A big black man starts chansing us we get away and go back just to see TWO black guys around the corner. 10/10 MUST BUY

reviews.review_title: Really bad don't wasthe your money
reviews.review_description: This game is such a bad investment, sure the models are custom made but the physics are bad and the tracking withbthe ground stick is unplayable. NEVER AGAIN I WOULD RATHER GET RUN OVER 5 TIMES BEFORE I PLAY THIS FOR THE FIRST TIME AGAIN

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that you had such a frustrating experience with Facility Apes.

From what you described, it sounds like the game may be experiencing performance or tracking issues on your device. Facility Apes is around 3 GB and needs enough free storage and memory to run properly, so we recommend freeing up space on your Quest if needed.

Please also make sure you are using the default Quest settings and that you have not changed the headset refresh rate through SideQuest, as this can cause lag, unstable physics, or tracking issues. If you are playing on Quest 2, please make sure the game is running with the Quest 2 settings.

We appreciate feedback, but we kindly ask that it stays respectful so we can better understand and fix the issue.

reviews.review_description: This is a perfect game, although i might sound like im glazing the game but im not. No in app perchases make this game awsome and its not pay to win. No lag, but the only thing this game has wrong is the disconected error. But over all this game is good!

reviews.review_title: Best backrooms game I’ve  ever played
reviews.review_description: The amount of creativity and hardwork put into these maps is unbelievable! For the second time since backrooms all seeing I genuinely feel like I’m in the backrooms with that strange nostalgic vibe. This game needs more players and the fact that it costs as much as a chocolate bar is crazy. If you’re considering on buying this game, please do!

i bought this game for me and my friends and we had a blast i don't understand why the haters are saying that this is a horrible game it's very good you guys just need a couple of fixes like a setting to turn off colliders but other than that it's very good game

Facility Apes 3 is probably the best VR Backrooms game I’ve played. 40+ unique, high quality levels that you can play in. Good Community, Good Graphics, over all Great Game. I would Recommend playing this game if finding a Backrooms game.

I was playing the game normally on the first day. I got off and then went to go play it the next day, and then this glitch came. 

My hands are bouncing and glitching through the floor. When I run, my head goes out of my body and then glitches back. I'm sticking to the floor and I can't run. 

I want to play this game, it's just I can't with this glitch. So, devs, if you have a solution to this, say something. 

And also, I'm playing on the Quest 3 with Quest Pro controllers, if that changes anything.Actually, I tried playing on the controllers the Quest 3 came with, but the glitch still happened.I also used Quest Games Optimizer. It was working perfectly fine the first day, but then the next day, the glitch came.I also turned off the Quest Games Optimizer, but the glitch was still there. So I don't think that's the issue.

To start off it does cost some money obviously... But it is totally worth it! And all that money you get to play a realistic backrooms game with over 43+ levels!? At the moment I don't see any other VR backrooms games like that. So I would recommend buying this If you want to have something to do for a week or two!

This game has everything, all the levels give a fun experience to play with friends and a little challenge to keep you from flying through the levels. All the levels are very detailed and the game gets updated a lot. Highly recommend!

developer_response.body: Hello! Yes, we’re currently fixing that issue. Please give us 1–2 weeks to release Update 2, and then you should be able to play. I brought this game today thinking it would be another gorilla tag based horror game, and what is 4 dollars in this economy anyway. Apon entering I could tell the game already has more detail than many other horror games I’ve played. I played the first 4 levels and instantly thought of how fun it would be with my friend so I gifted it to him. We had so much fun playing 3, 1 hour session in the first day getting to level 11. The games puzzles are really well made and are somewhat based off of the steam game “escape the backrooms”. The quality is amazing, the way the game plays out is amazing and the level progressing and save slots add another level of polishing to the game. You way be sceptical at first thinking “4 dollars. Really. Why can’t it just be free” but you better be glad that’s all the game costs. You are getting 43 extremely well made levels with hours of play time and exploration crammed into each and every corner. Even though I ONLY said 42 there are some levels with multiple sub levels brining the game closer to 60-70 levels. My only issue is the storage system. I would’ve loved for it to be a backpack so it is more portable and you can make use of the energy bars when you are in tight situations. I also would’ve loved more monster designs, in the horror hotels second sub level you only see 2 monsters that have already appeared in previous levels. It would’ve been cool to add another monster in there to introduce more monsters but I’m sure there will be more in the future. Thank you for listening to my yap about this game, I just love it so much and it is an amazing bargain.

This game is amazing for a lot of reasons. One is that you can play with other people, and another is that it is very well made. I don’t know if it’s possible to write every amazing thing because the whole game is amazing! I would consider buying it!

If you are a backrooms fan, buy this. By the time I’m making this it has 46 levels, it has good graphics, AND levels are still being added. It’s a steal the fact it’s only 4 bucks.

Edit:
The developers response is reasonable. I understand why there currently is no host migration. And the developers say that they will fix the issue with the monsters. Games always need improvement and there is no perfect game (a perfect game would probably be boring).

If you still want to read this review, here it is:

- Monsters constantly camp your spot so you're unable to move from spawn
- For some reason, your player model's hands vibrate when you don't move your hands
- Lobbys do not have host migration meaning a lobby can just spontaneously close

These things add up really quickly.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback. We’re currently working on a difficulty setting that should help with monsters camping spawn or blocking progress, and that update is planned to come out soon.

Regarding host migration: we currently do not support it because the host owns the save file locally. Adding host migration could create issues such as duplicated or inconsistent save files, so we are being careful with how we handle that.

As for the levels being similar to *Escape the Backrooms*, the Backrooms itself is a broad and generic concept used by many games. Nothing has been directly taken from that game, and our project also includes its own content, mechanics, and additions.

We appreciate the criticism and are actively working on improving the game.
